features.name: class type parameter factory with upcast
features.description: Code should include a parameterized factory class that returns a type parameter, where the returned type is a derived class assigned to a base class variable
features.snippet: class factory#(type T); static function T create; T obj = new; return obj; endfunction endclass

features.name: class inheritance upcast via static method
features.description: Code should include a derived class with a static create method, where the derived class is assigned to a base class type variable after creation

features.name: conditional class type creation with upcast
features.description: Code should include a ternary expression using random bit selection to determine which of two class creation paths is taken, with the result assigned to a base class type
features.snippet: if (bit'($random)) f = bar::create; else f = factory#(foo)::create();
